title: God’s Knights Open the Abyss
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Usopp, Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Nami as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you can't talk when you humans kill each other all the time over land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say having children with a giant from another land taints the blood of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems giants can be just as bigoted as anyone else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not everyone's as pure as you, nami-taso!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't suck up to me, Trash!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why join Hajrubin's crew if you think he has "Tainted Blood"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're such a creepy nerd, RODo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was always so... earnest and straight- forward, unlike me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He never lived in the castle growing up. His father may have been king, but his mother was ostracized.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He endured a lot and still said this:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "One day, I'm gonna unite all the giant tribes..."

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be King of the Giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woooo! I know you're the man that can do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to make his dream a reality!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That kind of boring motivation is nothing new to me.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I found some knocked out giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I CAN'T MOVE FROM THIS SPOT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The result would be the same even if you could.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are offering you a chance at divinity!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...just for the slightest change to attain such an honor!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
